description: Deterministic in-training-distribution regression subset for the latest locally available Friday 2026-07-10 collection session (20260710_112359). Raw session episodes 0-12 map to final training episodes 1625-1637. These episodes are not held out and all retained frames have subtask_index 0 (__unlabeled__).

selection.mapping: raw episode N maps to final episode 1625 + N
